title: Obsidian Gang Vanilla+
description: Client-side Vanilla+ Modpack. Can be played on single player and multiplayer. Made specifically for the Obsidian Gang server
body:
![Title](https://i.imgur.com/MFrynhC.png)

### Description
**This Mod pack is designed to greatly enhance the vanilla Minecraft experience, specifically for the Obsidian Gang Minecraft server. All of the mods in this pack are **client side** and can be used on **any world or server**. some settings might need to be adjusted to your liking depending on your device capabilities or personal preference.**

> ### Join Our Multiplayer Server
> **Java & Bedrock**
> 
> **IP:** play.obsidiangang.com
> 
> **Bedrock port:** 19132

### Features
✔️ Works on any server

✔️ Better Performance

✔️ Distant Horizons

✔️ Ambient Sounds

✔️ Quality of life improvements and features

✔️ Overhauled World Generation

✔️ Shader Support and pre-included shader packs

✔️ More Structures

✔️ New Bosses and Mobs

✔️ Overhauld Animations

[Join our Discord server!](https://discord.gg/x8B8HTbBcc)
